config.script:
#include "50211" #include "50212"
function open_document_in_its_editor(byref pFileStream): open_document_in_its_editor=false if (pFileStream is nothing) then exit function end if
if (pFileStream.isEmpty()) then exit function end if
'create pFD object if (not Create_FileDriveObject()) then exit function end if
dim pSystem : set pSystem=doc_.system
dim strFile : strFile=pSystem.createtempfilename("x", pFileStream.ext)
pFileStream.save strFile if (pFD.isFile( strFile )) then open_document_in_its_editor = Run( strFile ) end if
end function
function get_filename_extension(byval strFileName) : get_filename_extension = "" 'create pFD object if (not Create_FileDriveObject()) then exit function end if get_filename_extension = CStr(pFD.GetFileExtension(strFileName)) end function
